comment.text: This translation key is used to display a tooltip indicating the total storage upgrade from one plan size to another. It appears in a plan info section of a UI component and provides context about storage size changes. The format includes "fromSize" and "toSize" variables that represent the original and upgraded storage sizes, respectively.

usage.context:
<Text
 fontWeight="600"
 fontSize="14px"
 className={styles.rowValue}
 >
 {t("Payments:StorageUpgradeMessage", {
 fromSize: `${currentStoragePlanSize} ${t("Common:Gigabyte")}`,
 toSize: isExceedingStorageLimit
 ? `${maxStorageLimit}+ ${t("Common:Gigabyte")}`
 : `${amount} ${t("Common:Gigabyte")}`,
 })}
